summary: Mexico 1-0 击败 South Korea 后两战全胜锁定出线主动权，Group B 则由 Canada 和 Switzerland 同积 4 分领跑。
summary_zh: 墨西哥 1-0 击败韩国后两战全胜，掌握 A 组出线主动权；B 组则由加拿大和瑞士同积 4 分领跑。
summary_en: Mexico beat South Korea 1-0 to take control of Group A, while Canada and Switzerland lead Group B with four points each.

highlights: Michal Sadílek 第 5 分钟为 Czechia 取得梦幻开局
South Africa 后程压上，并由 Teboho Mokoena 第 83 分钟点球扳平
两队均只积 1 分，末轮分别对阵 Mexico 与 South Korea 时仍需取分争夺出线
highlights_zh: Michal Sadílek 第 5 分钟为捷克取得梦幻开局
南非后程压上，并由 Teboho Mokoena 第 83 分钟点球扳平
两队均只积 1 分，末轮仍需取分争夺出线机会
highlights_en: Michal Sadílek gave Czechia a dream start in the 5th minute
South Africa pushed forward late and Teboho Mokoena equalized from the penalty spot in the 83rd minute
Both teams remain on one point and still need a result in the final round

highlights: Luis Romo 第 50 分钟破门，帮助 Mexico 打破僵局
South Korea 末段持续施压，但未能扳平比分
Raúl Rangel 终场前作出关键扑救，Mexico 保住 1-0 胜局
highlights_zh: Luis Romo 第 50 分钟破门，帮助墨西哥打破僵局
韩国队下半场持续施压，但未能扳平比分
Raúl Rangel 终场前作出关键扑救，墨西哥保住 1-0 胜局
highlights_en: Luis Romo broke the deadlock in the 50th minute for Mexico
South Korea pushed hard in the second half but could not find an equalizer
Raúl Rangel made a key late save as Mexico protected the 1-0 win

highlights: Johan Manzambi 替补登场后梅开二度，带动 Switzerland 下半场后段爆发
Tarik Muharemović 被罚下后，Bosnia and Herzegovina 末段防线崩盘
Granit Xhaka 补时点球锁定 4-1，Switzerland 积 4 分保有强劲出线主动权
highlights_zh: Johan Manzambi 替补登场后梅开二度，带动瑞士下半场后段爆发
Tarik Muharemović 被罚下后，波黑末段防线崩盘
Granit Xhaka 补时点球锁定 4-1，瑞士积 4 分保有强劲出线主动权
highlights_en: Substitute Johan Manzambi scored twice to spark Switzerland's late surge
Bosnia and Herzegovina collapsed late after Tarik Muharemović was sent off
Granit Xhaka sealed the 4-1 win from the penalty spot in stoppage time

highlights: Jonathan David 上演帽子戏法，Canada 收获男足世界杯队史首胜
Qatar 先后有 Homam Ahmed 与 Assim Madibo 被红牌罚下，最终九人完赛
Ismaël Koné 遭遇严重腿伤被担架抬离，Canada 的大胜也因此蒙上阴影
highlights_zh: Jonathan David 上演帽子戏法，加拿大收获男足世界杯队史首胜
卡塔尔先后有 Homam Ahmed 与 Assim Madibo 被红牌罚下，最终九人完赛
Ismaël Koné 遭遇严重腿伤被担架抬离，加拿大的大胜也因此蒙上阴影
highlights_en: Jonathan David scored a hat trick as Canada earned their first men's World Cup win
Qatar finished with nine men after Homam Ahmed and Assim Madibo were sent off
Canada's big win was overshadowed by Ismaël Koné being stretchered off with a serious leg injury

standings_changes: Group A：Mexico 1-0 击败 South Korea 后两战全胜积 6 分，提前掌握出线主动权
Group A：South Korea 仍积 3 分排名第二，Czechia 与 South Africa 均积 1 分，末轮仍有追赶机会
Group B：Canada 6-0 大胜 Qatar 后积 4 分，凭 +6 净胜球升至小组第一
Group B：Switzerland 4-1 击败 Bosnia and Herzegovina，同积 4 分并以 +3 净胜球排名第二
Group B：Bosnia and Herzegovina 与 Qatar 均积 1 分，末轮直接对话将决定是否仍有出线希望
Group A：Czechia 与 South Africa 1-1 战平后均积 1 分，末轮仍需赢球并关注 South Korea 赛果
standings_changes_zh: Group A：墨西哥两战全胜积 6 分，出线形势占优
Group A：韩国仍积 3 分排名第二，捷克与南非均积 1 分，末轮仍有追赶机会
Group B：加拿大 6-0 大胜卡塔尔后积 4 分，凭 +6 净胜球升至小组第一
Group B：瑞士 4-1 击败波黑，同积 4 分并以 +3 净胜球排名第二
Group B：波黑与卡塔尔均积 1 分，末轮直接对话将决定是否仍有出线希望
Group A：捷克与南非 1-1 战平后均积 1 分，末轮仍需赢球并关注韩国赛果
standings_changes_en: Group A: Mexico now have two wins from two and are in a strong position to qualify
Group A: South Korea remain second on three points, while Czechia and South Africa are both still alive on one point
Group B: Canada moved top with four points and a +6 goal difference after beating Qatar 6-0
Group B: Switzerland also reached four points after a 4-1 win over Bosnia and Herzegovina
Group B: Bosnia and Herzegovina and Qatar both have one point, making their final-round meeting decisive
Group A: Czechia and South Africa both need a win in the final round after their 1-1 draw

news.title: Canada 6-0 Qatar：Jonathan David 帽子戏法带来加拿大男足世界杯首胜
news.title_zh: 加拿大 6-0 卡塔尔：Jonathan David 帽子戏法带来队史首胜
news.title_en: Canada 6-0 Qatar: Jonathan David hat trick delivers Canada's first men's World Cup win

news.title: Switzerland 4-1 Bosnia and Herzegovina：Manzambi 替补双响改写 Group B 形势
news.title_zh: 瑞士 4-1 波黑：Manzambi 替补双响改写 B 组形势
news.title_en: Switzerland 4-1 Bosnia and Herzegovina: Manzambi brace reshapes Group B

news.title: Czechia 1-1 South Africa：Mokoena 点球救回一分，两队末轮仍需抢分
news.title_zh: 捷克 1-1 南非：Mokoena 点球救回一分，两队末轮仍需抢分
news.title_en: Czechia 1-1 South Africa: Mokoena penalty keeps both teams alive

news.title: Mexico 1-0 South Korea：Luis Romo 破门，东道主两连胜
news.title_zh: 墨西哥 1-0 韩国：Luis Romo 破门，东道主两连胜
news.title_en: Mexico 1-0 South Korea: Luis Romo goal gives the hosts back-to-back wins

news.title: Scotland 备战 Morocco，Steve Clarke 称对手是 Group C 的真正强队考验
news.title_zh: 苏格兰备战摩洛哥，Steve Clarke 称对手是 C 组真正考验
news.title_en: Scotland prepare for Morocco as Steve Clarke calls them Group C's real test
